ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area of the county in square miles */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the county was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_affiliations" (
  "affiliation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliation record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county this record belongs to */,
  "democrats" INTEGER /* Number of registered Democrats */,
  "republicans" INTEGER /* Number of registered Republicans */,
  "libertarians" INTEGER /* Number of registered Libertarians */,
  "green" INTEGER /* Number of registered Green party voters */,
  "constitution" INTEGER /* Number of registered Constitution party voters */,
  "unaffiliated" INTEGER /* Number of unaffiliated voters */,
  "other_parties" INTEGER /* Number of voters affiliated with other parties */,
  "party_affiliation_date" TEXT /* Date the party affiliation data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_political_affiliations_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county this record belongs to */,
  "white" INTEGER /* Number of White residents */,
  "black" INTEGER /* Number of Black residents */,
  "american_indian" INTEGER /* Number of American Indian residents */,
  "native_hawaiian" INTEGER /* Number of Native Hawaiian residents */,
  "other" INTEGER /* Number of Other racial or ethnic residents */,
  "hispanic" INTEGER /* Number of Hispanic residents */,
  "asian" INTEGER /* Number of Asian residents */,
  "pacific_islander" INTEGER /* Number of Pacific Islander residents */,
  "multiracial" INTEGER /* Number of Multiracial residents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gender_distribution" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county this record belongs to */,
  "male" INTEGER /* Number of male voters */,
  "female" INTEGER /* Number of female voters */,
  "undisclosed_gender" INTEGER /* Number of voters with undisclosed gender */,
  "non_binary" INTEGER /* Number of Non-binary voters */,
  "gender_distribution_date" TEXT /* Date the gender distribution data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gender_distribution_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnout record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county this record belongs to */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters */,
  "voted" INTEGER /* Number of voters who actually voted */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who voted */,
  "early_votes" INTEGER /* Number of early votes */,
  "absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes */,
  "election_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_election_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_type_id") REFERENCES election_types ("election_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county this record belongs to */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Party of the winning candidate */,
  "votes_for_winner" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the winning candidate */,
  "votes_for_runner_up" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the runner-up */,
  "election_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election type */,
  "winner_party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the winning candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_registration" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter registration record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county this record belongs to */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date of voter registration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "registration_method" TEXT /* Method of voter registration (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the registered voter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_types" (
  "election_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the election type */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election type (e.g., General, Primary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election type */,
  "election_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the election (e.g., annual, biennial) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the election is held */,
  "election_year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "election_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the election */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "early_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of early voting */,
  "early_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date of early voting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_election_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_type_id") REFERENCES election_types ("election_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "affected_table" TEXT /* Name of the table affected by the action */,
  "affected_record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected by the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
